dashboard.shareYourLinkDesc: Salin link referensi dan bagikan untuk mendapatkan komisi 50%
dashboard.campaignTiersDesc: Aktifkan tingkat untuk membuka komisi grid
dashboard.compPlanDesc: Pahami cara Anda menghasilkan — 5 sumber pendapatan, 95% dibayarkan ke anggota
dashboard.analyticsDesc: Lacak pendapatan, referensi, dan kinerja kampanye secara real-time
dashboard.myNetworkDesc: Lihat tim Anda berkembang — lacak referensi, level, dan aktivitas
dashboard.noRecentActivity: Belum ada aktivitas. Bagikan link untuk mulai menghasilkan!
dashboard.goalShareLink: Bagikan link untuk komisi pertama Anda
dashboard.goalShareLinkDesc: Setiap referensi Basic menghasilkan ${{commission}}/bulan. Hanya {{needed}} referensi dan keanggotaan ${{cost}} Anda terbayar.
dashboard.goal1MoreReferral: 1 referensi lagi dan keanggotaan terbayar sendiri
dashboard.goal1MoreDesc: Anda memiliki {{refs}} referensi menghasilkan ${{earning}}/bulan. Satu lagi dan keanggotaan ${{cost}} Anda tertutupi.
dashboard.goalNMoreDesc: Anda memiliki {{refs}} referensi menghasilkan ${{earning}}/bulan. {{remaining}} lagi dan keanggotaan gratis.
dashboard.goalEarningMonthDesc: Keanggotaan terbayar, keuntungan ${{profit}}/bulan. Capai 10 referensi untuk ${{target}}/bulan.
dashboard.goalGridDesc: Grid {{tierName}} Anda memiliki {{filled}}/{{total}} posisi terisi. {{remaining}} lagi untuk membuka bonus.
dashboard.goalWithdrawDesc: Dompet afiliasi Anda memiliki ${{balance}}. Penarikan minimum $10.
dashboard.goalKeepBuilding: Terus bangun referensi untuk mencapai ambang.
dashboard.goalWatchCompleteDesc: Anda telah menonton semua {{required}} video hari ini. Anda memenuhi syarat penarikan. Reset tengah malam.
dashboard.goalWatchNotStarted: Anda belum menonton video hari ini
dashboard.goalWatchNowDesc: Selesaikan tontonan harian untuk tetap memenuhi syarat. Butuh {{required}} video hari ini.
dashboard.goalStartWatching: Mulai menonton untuk tetap memenuhi syarat
dashboard.goalStartWatchingDesc: Tonton video harian Anda untuk mempertahankan kelayakan penarikan dompet kampanye.

network.title: My Network & Earnings
network.subtitle: Your referrals, team, and commission history
network.shareYourLink: Share your referral link to start building your network
network.commissionsAppear: Commissions appear here as your network grows

compPlan.title: Compensation Plan
compPlan.subtitle: 4 income streams from one platform
compPlan.heroDesc: Click any income stream below to explore how it works
compPlan.memKey1: Paid instantly on every signup — no minimum requirements
compPlan.memKey2: Recurring monthly as long as your referral stays active
compPlan.memKey3: Annual referrals pay a big one-time commission upfront
compPlan.memKey4: No campaign tier required — earn from day one
compPlan.memKey5: Commissions go to your Affiliate Wallet — withdraw anytime
compPlan.gridKey1: Activate a Campaign Tier to enter the 8×8 Income Grid (64 positions)
compPlan.gridKey2: Your referrals and their referrals fill your grid positions
compPlan.gridKey3: Positions fill in order — Level 1 first, then Level 2, and so on through all 8 levels. This is what creates the auto-place effect as your team grows
compPlan.gridKey4: When all 64 positions fill, you earn the completion bonus and a new grid starts (advance)
compPlan.gridKey5: Higher tiers unlock more daily campaign views and bigger bonuses
compPlan.gridKey6: Grid earnings go to your Campaign Wallet — requires active tier + daily watch quota
compPlan.gridKey7: 5% of each tier purchase goes to the company — 95% is paid to members
compPlan.moneyBreakdown: 50% covers AI service costs (video, image, music, voice generation), 15% covers platform management, and 35% is paid out as member commissions (15% direct + 10% auto-place + 10% completion bonus).
compPlan.perPositionNote: Per-position earnings — you earn this amount each time a slot fills
compPlan.calcDesc: See what you could earn based on your scenario
compPlan.buyAll8: This is for one nexus. Buy all 8 packs to have 8 nexuses earning simultaneously.
compPlan.nexusKey1: Each credit pack has its own independent 3×3 nexus (39 positions)
compPlan.nexusKey2: Buy a pack → get AI credits + enter your sponsor's nexus
compPlan.nexusKey3: Positions fill left to right, top to bottom — Level 1 fills first (3 slots), then Level 2 (9 slots), then Level 3 (27 slots). This is what creates the auto-place effect
compPlan.nexusKey4: Commission = 15% if you recruited them, 10% if auto-placed
compPlan.nexusKey5: When all 39 positions fill, you earn a 10% completion bonus and a new nexus starts
compPlan.nexusKey6: 65% of credit pack cost covers AI services and platform management
compPlan.nexusKey7: Commissions go to your Affiliate Wallet — always withdrawable
compPlan.courseKey1: Create and sell digital courses on the SuperAdPro marketplace
compPlan.courseKey2: Keep 100% of your first sale — no platform cut
compPlan.courseKey3: Subsequent sales pass up to your sponsor in a cascade system
compPlan.courseKey4: The deeper your network, the more pass-ups flow to you
compPlan.courseKey6: This feature is coming soon — stay tuned for the launch
compPlan.repurchaseSubtitle: Why you don't need thousands of recruits
compPlan.repurchaseDesc: Traditional network marketing requires you to constantly recruit new people. SuperAdPro is different — your income is driven by repeat purchases from the same team members.
compPlan.campaignTiersRepDesc: Members buy a campaign tier to get video views delivered. When their views are used up, they repurchase to get more. Every repurchase fills new positions in your grid and pays you commissions again.
compPlan.creditPacksRepDesc: Members buy credits to create AI videos, images, and music. When credits run out, they buy more. Every repurchase fills new positions in your nexus and pays you commissions again.
compPlan.repStep1: You recruit 3 people — that's all you need
compPlan.repStep2: They use AI credits and campaign views as part of their marketing
compPlan.repStep3: When they run out, they repurchase — your nexus and grid fill again
compPlan.repStep4: When your nexus hits 39/39, it advances and a new one starts
compPlan.repStep5: The same 39 people repurchasing fills your next nexus automatically
compPlan.repStep6: Small team + repeat business = sustainable recurring income
compPlan.twoWallets: Two Wallets — How Earnings Are Paid

wallet.title: ◎ Dompet
wallet.subtitle: Saldo, komisi, dan penarikan Anda
wallet.affiliateWalletDesc: Referensi keanggotaan, komisi sponsor Studio, penjualan kursus, Pay It Forward.
wallet.campaignWalletDesc: Komisi grid: 40% sponsor langsung, 6.25% uni-level, bonus penyelesaian.
wallet.campaignFeeNote: Min $10 · Biaya $1.00 · Tingkat aktif + kuota tontonan diperlukan
wallet.noCampaignEarnings: Belum ada pendapatan kampanye. Aktifkan tingkat untuk memulai.
wallet.referAndActivate: Referensikan anggota dan aktifkan grid untuk mulai menghasilkan.
wallet.graceWarning: Saldo tidak cukup — isi ulang ke $20 USDT.
wallet.renewalAutoDeducted: $20 perpanjangan dipotong otomatis. Selama dompet ada saldo, keanggotaan tetap aktif.
wallet.sendFundsDesc: Transfer USDT ke anggota aktif mana pun dengan ID mereka (mis. SAP-00042). Instan dan gratis.

watch.title: Tonton untuk Mendapatkan
watch.noMoreVideos: Tidak ada video lagi saat ini
watch.watchedAllAvailable: Anda telah menonton semua {{watched}} video tetapi kuota harian adalah {{limit}}. Kembali nanti.
watch.watchedAllRequired: Anda telah menonton semua {{count}} video yang diperlukan hari ini. Komisi Anda berkualifikasi. Kembali besok!
watch.topEarners: Yang terbaik tidak pernah melewatkan satu hari.
watch.checkBackSoon: Kembali segera — kampanye ditambahkan saat pengiklan mengaktifkan tingkat.
watch.watchedOfToday: Hari ini Anda menonton {{watched}}/{{limit}} video. Anda berkualifikasi untuk penarikan.
watch.missedDays: Anda melewatkan {{count}} hari. Selesaikan kuota untuk melindungi pendapatan.
watch.watchInstructions: Video harus ditonton 30 detik dengan tab ini aktif. Selesaikan {{limit}} per hari untuk mempertahankan kualifikasi.
watch.returnToTab: Kembali ke tab ini untuk melanjutkan

upgrade.subtitle: Pilih paket Anda

upgrade.couldNotStart: Tidak dapat memulai pembayaran. Coba lagi.
upgrade.basicDesc: Semua yang Anda butuhkan untuk mulai pemasaran dan menghasilkan dengan AI.
upgrade.proDesc: Suite lengkap alat pemasaran AI plus otomasi lanjutan.
upgrade.featCreativeStudio: Studio Kreatif — video AI, gambar, musik, dan narasi
upgrade.featLinkTools: Alat Link — link pendek, rotator, pelacakan
upgrade.featContentCreator: Pembuat Konten — posting sosial, teks iklan, skrip video

upgrade.featLeadsCRM: CRM Lead Saya — tangkap, lacak, dan kelola lead
upgrade.featCourseCreator: Pembuat Kursus — buat dan jual kursus (segera)
upgrade.featPrioritySupport: Dukungan prioritas — waktu respons lebih cepat
upgrade.earnWhileGrowDesc: Referensikan anggota dan dapatkan 50% komisi — setiap bulan atau pembayaran besar saat tagihan tahunan.
upgrade.securePaymentFooter: Pembayaran aman via USDT/USDC di Polygon atau 350+ crypto via NOWPayments · Semua penjualan bersifat final

visualiser.title: Visualiser
visualiser.subtitle: Watch your income streams come to life
visualiser.pressPlayToWatch: Press Play to watch your team build...
visualiser.simulationDisclaimer: Simulation for educational purposes only. Actual earnings depend on personal activity and network performance. Income is not guaranteed.
visualiser.yourGridFills: Your grid fills from your entire network
visualiser.gridFillsDesc: Every person who joins anywhere in your downline fills a seat in your grid. Your direct referrals AND their referrals AND deeper — all the way down. One person, one seat, per advance.

features.linkToolsDesc: Short links, QR codes, UTM tracking

campaignTiers.title: Tingkat Kampanye
campaignTiers.subtitle: Aktifkan tingkat untuk mengiklankan video dan menghasilkan komisi grid
campaignTiers.heroDesc: Setiap tingkat memberikan tayangan video nyata melalui jaringan Tonton untuk Mendapatkan. Anda mendapat komisi saat grid terisi 64 anggota.
campaignTiers.howItWorksDesc: Setiap tingkat memberikan tayangan nyata. Saat diaktifkan, Anda ditempatkan di grid 8×8 dengan 64 posisi.
campaignTiers.renewalDesc: Tingkat berakhir setelah semua tayangan terkirim. Cukup aktifkan ulang. Pembayaran USDT satu kali.
campaignTiers.earningsDisclaimer: Pendapatan berdasarkan 5 referensi pribadi. Penghasilan dapat bervariasi.
